ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (M/F) */,
  "has_extra_curricular" TEXT /* Indicates whether the student has extra-curricular activities (Y/N) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the student resides */,
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature category of the city */,
  "educational_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educational level of the student */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable indicating the outcome (e.g., 0 for not achieving, 1 for achieving) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "socio_economic_status" TEXT /* Socio-economic status of the student's family */,
  "parental_education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the student's parents */,
  "parental_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the student's parents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_educational_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("educational_level_id") REFERENCES educational_levels ("educational_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_temperature_id FOREIGN KEY ("temperature_id") REFERENCES temperatures ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature category */,
  "temperature_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature category (e.g., Hot, Warm, Cold) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperature for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "educational_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "educational_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level (e.g., High School, Bachelors, Masters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educational_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extra_curricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extra-curricular activity */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the activity is available */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extra-curricular activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the extra-curricular activity (e.g., Sports, Arts, Science) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the activity is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extra_curricular_activities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_extra_curricular" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student participating in the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the extra-curricular activity */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the student participated in the activity */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the activity (e.g., team member, leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the school is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the school (e.g., state board, central board) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_schools" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduate_date" TEXT /* Date when the student graduated from the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the university is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the university (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the university on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the university (e.g., state university, central university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_universities" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduate_date" TEXT /* Date when the student graduated from the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the student data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_surveys" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student participating in the survey */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the student participated in the survey */,
  "responses" TEXT /* JSON object containing the responses to the survey questions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_pathways" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "high_school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the high school */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "postgraduate_university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postgraduate university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
